=====================================
File Tab Opener (Windows) - Read Me
=====================================

[Version] 1.0.0
[Type] Freeware

[Overview]
A native Windows application for managing and opening folders as Explorer tabs.
Group folders by project and open them all as Explorer tabs with one click.

[System Requirements]
- Windows 11 22H2 or later
- Explorer tab feature required

[Installation]
1. Place FileTabOpenerW.exe in any folder
2. Launch the app

* On first launch, Windows SmartScreen may show a warning.
  Click "More info" then "Run anyway".

[Key Features]
- Tab group management (create, rename, copy, delete, reorder)
- One-click open all folders as Explorer tabs
- Compact and Sidebar layout toggle
- Folder history with pin support
- Window position/size save and restore
- Automatic dark mode support
- 5 languages (English, Japanese, Korean, Traditional/Simplified Chinese)

[Configuration]
%APPDATA%\FileTabOpenerW\config.json
* Compatible with the Python version (file_tab_opener)

[Uninstall]
Simply delete the exe file.
To also remove settings:
  Delete the %APPDATA%\FileTabOpenerW folder

[Support]
- GitHub: https://github.com/obott9/FileTabOpenerW
- Email: obott9.dev@gmail.com
